case_title: KEVIN SAELEE ET AL VS. PENHALL COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73690977) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAELEE, KEVIN AN INDIVIDUAL KIDWELL, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL
STIPULATION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES FILED IN SUPPORT OF JOINT STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE (TRANSACTION ID # 76941403) FILED BY PENHALL COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS PENHALL COMPANY'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619051, CGC-24-619706 WITH CASE CGC-24-616541. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION IN PART AND CONSOLIDATES THE THREE ACTIONS, WITH SAELEE AS THE LEAD CASE, BUT DENIES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE REQUEST TO RESET THE TRIAL DATE IN THE CONSOLIDATED ACTION. ANY MOTIONS AFFECTING TRIAL DATES MUST BE MADE IN DEPARTMENT 206 OF THIS COURT. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

Off Calendar May-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT PENHALL COMPANY'S PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE PER NOTICE AND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,822 AGAINST PENHALL COMPANY

No appearances. At the request of the parties (received via email), the court modifies its ruling and takes this motion off calendar. The court will execute the parties' stipulation and proposed order resolving this motion. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Penhall Company?S Person Most Knowledgeable Per Notice And For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $7,822 Against Penhall Company; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of William E. Donahoo
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Penhall Company?S Person Most Knowledgeable Per Notice And For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $7,822 Against Penhall Company; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of William E. Donahoo
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To Jul-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619051, CGC-24-619706 WITH CASE CGC-24-616541
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PENHALL COMPANY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-619051, CGC-24-619706 WITH CASE CGC-24-616541.

The unopposed motion for consolidation is granted in part and denied in part.

The parties to Saelee v. Penhall, Case No. CGC-24-616541; Carrillo v. Penhall, Case No. CGC-24-619051; and Lemus v. Penhall, CGC-24-619706, have stipulated to consolidate these cases for all purposes, with Saelee as the lead action. The parties further stipulate that the trial date for the consolidated action should be the trial date presently set in Lemus of May 18, 2026. This department does not set trial dates. The court grants the motion in part and consolidates the three actions, with Saelee as the lead case, but denies without prejudice the request to reset the trial date in the consolidated action. Any motions affecting trial dates must be made in Department 206 of this court.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
